Vatanına, milletine, devletine aşkla bağlı; donanımlı, vicdanlı, öz güven ve sorumluluk sahibi subay ve astsubayların yetiştiği bu ocak,

social.name: Emmanuel Macron
social.text: Pensées émues pour les victimes des terribles incendies qui frappent l’Espagne et pour leurs familles. J’exprime la solidarité de la France qui lutte aussi contre les flammes. Hommage à tous les pompiers mobilisés.

social.text:
I promised that we would fix our NHS, so it’s fit for the future.

Today, more patients are reporting improved experiences with their GP, dentist, and pharmacist since we’ve been in government.

Delivering real change to people across the country.

We must deliver a stronger NATO.
